items.title: Is Home Depot Still a Good Value After the Recent 10% Share Price Dip?
items.description: Thinking about what to do with your Home Depot stock? You’re not alone. Every week, investors check in on their portfolios, spot companies like Home Depot, and wonder whether this is a hold, a buy, or something to let go. Home Depot’s recent price swings have given everyone a reason to look again. Over the last month, shares have slipped by 10.2%, with a modest dip for the year so far. The last year hasn’t been easy either, down 6.5%. If you zoom out to the last five years, the gain stands at...
